description: Phase 4 intelligence benchmark (ARCHITECTURE.md P4 DoD + intelligence-execution-plan.md §6). Core: 50 coach-phrased prompts that must produce a valid, correctly-routed ChatReport (pass rate >= 0.95 enforced). Adversarial: guardrail cases that must pass 100%. Play ids reference the bigdatabowl_2023 fixture (KC team context 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001).
